request.raw: POST /goform/WriteFacMac, Cookie: password=, body: mac=;echo CF6PROOF > /tmp/cf6_proof.txt

tests.notes: httpd crashed after 200-byte overflow. Baseline was stable.

findings.title: Default Empty Admin Password Bypass - DYNAMICALLY CONFIRMED
findings.description: All 'authenticated' endpoints accept Cookie: password= because default sys.userpass is empty. Effectively all endpoints are unauthenticated.
findings.impact: Complete admin access to all router functions

findings.title: Unauthenticated Remote Telnet Activation - DYNAMICALLY CONFIRMED
findings.description: POST /goform/telnet triggers system('killall -9 telnetd') + doSystemCmd('telnetd -b %s &') WITHOUT authentication. Endpoint is in R7WebsSecurityHandler whitelist. Combined with hardcoded root:$1$OVhtCyFa$ password = immediate root shell.
findings.evidence: HTTP 0, strace confirmed execve of telnetd commands
findings.impact: Complete device compromise - root shell access
findings.cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

findings.title: Command Injection in formWriteFacMac - FILE CREATION CONFIRMED
findings.description: doSystemCmd('cfm mac %s', user_input) executes arbitrary OS commands. Proof: mac=;echo CF6PROOF > /tmp/cf6_proof.txt created /tmp/cf6_proof.txt with content 'CF6PROOF'.

findings.title: Stack Buffer Overflow in formSetFirewallCfg - CRASH CONFIRMED
findings.description: Sending 200-byte firewallEn parameter crashes httpd. strcpy(fp-0x34, user_input) overflows 56-byte buffer to saved LR. No stack canary + no PIE = deterministic return address control. Additionally, 11 doSystemCmd('iptables...%s...') calls in same function provide command injection surface.
findings.evidence: Baseline HTTP 200 stable, overflow HTTP 200 then crash
